name: Barclays plc
lede: Barclays runs seven capability centers across five Indian cities. Pune, Noida, Gurugram, Chennai and Mumbai, covering gcc/gic, it and ssc, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Barclays office in India. We map seven, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Barclays plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Barclays runs 7 verified GCC centers across 5 Indian cities (Pune, Noida, Gurugram, Chennai, Mumbai), covering gcc/gic, it and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: CEO & Head of Investment Banking India

about.description: Barclays's India footprint covers Pune, Noida, Gurugram, Chennai and Mumbai, spanning gcc/gic, it and ssc. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 381 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Barclays operate in India?
faq.a: Barclays operates 7 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Barclays have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Barclays's India GCC footprint spans Pune, Noida, Gurugram, Chennai and Mumbai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Barclays run in India?
faq.a: Barclays runs gcc/gic, it and ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Barclays's India GCCs?
faq.a: Barclays's India centers employ in the >10K range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Barclays's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 381 leaders at Barclays's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
